arts.ttl: Arne Slot admits Carabao Cup final mistake as he looks for Liverpool response vs Everton
arts.sum: Liverpool take on Everton in the Merseyside derby on Wednesday night with Arne Slot hopeful that they've recovered from their Carabao Cup defeat by Newcastle

arts.ttl: Everton's David Moyes makes frustrated Liverpool admission ahead of derby - "Sick of it"
arts.sum: Despite being a regular visitor to Anfield in his managerial career, David Moyes is still chasing a first win at Liverpool's home ground ahead of Everton heading there for the Merseyside derby

arts.ttl: Arne Slot calls crunch Liverpool meeting for title run-in after 'almost unacceptable' loss
arts.sum: Liverpool take on Everton in the Merseyside derby on Wednesday night looking to bounce back from disappointing results in the Carabao Cup and Champions League

arts.ttl: The ‘unacceptable’ Liverpool mistake that must change in Merseyside derby
arts.sum: Recent high-profile defeats to PSG and Newcastle ended Liverpool’s campaigns in two cup competitions and the manager must now to galvanise his team into a positive response

arts.ttl: Sky Sports confirms Liverpool’s interest in versatile defender hailed by Xabi Alonso
arts.sum: Liverpool are actively searching for defensive reinforcements ahead of the summer transfer window, with Bayer Leverkusen’s Piero Hincapie emerging as a prime target. With Virgil van Dijk’s contract situation unresolved and uncertainty surrounding Ibrahima Konaté’s future, the Reds are preparing for potential defensive changes. arts.ttl: Arne Slot warns Liverpool stars that hard work is their only option as Reds prepare for another Merseyside battle against Everton
arts.sum: LEWIS STEELE: It felt like the first day back at school after half-term as Arne Slot walked into his press conference sporting a fresh sun tan to accompany his usual jovial grin and demeanour.

arts.ttl: David Moyes hopes that Everton don’t need to sell players to meet Finanical Fair Play obligations
arts.sum: The Toffees boss explained that the club’s finances are in better shape but they will not have a ‘limitless budget’ in the transfer window

arts.ttl: Everton considering Goodison Park U-turn ahead of move to new stadium this summer
arts.sum: Everton are looking into the potential uses for Goodison Park when they move from their current home to their new state-of-the-art stadium at Bramley Moore Dock this summer

arts.ttl: Arne Slot reveals double Liverpool injury boost ahead of Merseyside derby against Everton
arts.sum: Liverpool head coach Arne Slot confirms a double injury boost ahead of Wednesday's Merseyside derby against Everton at Anfield.

arts.ttl: Team News: Liverpool vs. Everton injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Wednesday's Premier League clash between Liverpool and Everton.
